response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development with a strong focus on modern languages and frameworks (Node.js, TypeScript, React, etc.), but his C++ experience is limited and mostly outdated (last significant C++ work was in 2015). While he demonstrates strong architectural and problem-solving skills, his lack of recent C++/STL and industrial automation experience (e.g., message brokers, multi-threading, or secure development per IEC 62443) raises concerns. Cloud exposure (Node.js/AWS CDK) and cybersecurity awareness are present but not aligned with the role's requirements.
strengths: Strong problem-solving and architectural design skills demonstrated across diverse projects
Experience with performance-critical systems (low-latency apps, asynchronous I/O, caching)
Active in open-source contributions and technical community engagement
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last major C++ work was in 2015; role requires 8+ years of C++)
No clear experience with industrial automation protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850, etc.) or STL
Lacks direct experience with Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443 standards
